## Type

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] chore: Build/tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `go fmt ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New code has doc comments (exported symbols)
- [ ] New code has tests (where applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
